info.title: Sendbird Chat Platform API
info.description: Sendbird Chat Platform API provides server-side operations for managing users, channels, messages, and more in Sendbird applications.

get.description: Retrieves a list of users in the application.

post.description: Creates a new user in the application.

get.description: Retrieves information about a specific user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the user

delete.description: Deletes a user from the application.

get.description: Retrieves a list of group channels.
Retrieves a list of messages from a channel.

post.description: Sends a text, file, or admin message to a channel.

post.summary: Invite members to a group channel
post.description: Invite members to a group channel

post.summary: Ban a user from a channel
post.description: Ban a user from a channel

post.summary: Mute a user in a channel
post.description: Mute a user in a channel

ApiToken.name: Api-Token
ApiToken.description: Sendbird API token found in the dashboard
